name: human-ai-research-assistant-kit
description: AI Research Assistant side of the human-AI research collaboration model <suit-for-ai-research-assistant>: the thinking/writing/translation layer between informal human research and implementation-facing artifacts. One kit skill with eight modes — research discussion (sparring), concept explaining (teach-me), research log writing (incl. braindump-to-log protocol), decision/progress notes, code-agent tasks, technical references, literature survey fan-out, academic presentation writing. Doc-contract-driven: workspace facts live in the workspace-root RESEARCH-CONTEXT.md (portable via init). Register discipline, evidence labels, three-layer memory rule, and derivation-chain information safety built in.
